projectDescription: Mathematical models and empirical analysis of the general factor of human flourishing (f-factor) based on PERMA+H framework
keyFeatures: Four mathematical models of human flourishing (bifactor CFA, mutualism, Lyapunov stability, capabilities-adjusted)
Country-level wellbeing data analysis from World Happiness Report, OECD BLI, and World Bank
Individual-level replication using MIDUS psychological wellbeing data
PCA-based f-factor extraction with bootstrap confidence intervals
Mutualism dynamical system demonstrating positive manifold without latent variables
Lyapunov stability and resilience analysis for wellbeing equilibria
Comprehensive visualization suite for correlations, factor loadings, and trajectories
publicApiSurface: 01_download_wellbeing_data.py - Data acquisition pipeline for WHR, OECD BLI, World Bank indicators
02_analyze_wellbeing_f.py - PCA extraction of f-factor from country-level data
03_models_full_f.py - Complete implementation of bifactor CFA, mutualism, Lyapunov, capabilities models
04_individual_level_f_analysis.py - Individual-level replication with MIDUS Ryff wellbeing scales
MutualismSystem class - Coupled logistic growth ODEs for wellbeing dynamics
fit_bifactor_cfa() - Maximum likelihood bifactor confirmatory factor analysis
lyapunov_analysis() - Stability and resilience computation at equilibrium
compute_capabilities_adjusted_f() - Nussbaum threshold and Alkire-Foster deprivation scoring
